reviews.review_description: Unfortunately no response to my issue of height adjustment. I have tried everything to get the settings right but no succes. The floor adjustment feature will only reduce height by 25 cm, I need at least 50-60 for the trainer to be grounded at my level. Have scanned the room over and over again and other apps work fine. Otherwise the app looks really good.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that. And also sorry if you felt you got no response. That is not what we want.

Since this is working correctly for almost all users, something is clearly going wrong in your setup specifically. Please email us via verseus-games.com so we can help you properly, because if other apps work fine too, we want to look at this more closely with you.

reviews.review_description: Love this. Perfect for warming up before playing something intense. All three modes are fun. Kudos to the devs for making this a one time purchase and forget kind of thing instead of another subscription based garbage. Mixed reality also works great. The virtual trainers look amazing, but I would love it if you guys made them a bit more interactive or if we could have a separate "sparring" mode. Heck I trust you guys to even make a full blown standalone boxing game.

developer_response.body:
This review is so good, we might just print it out and hang it up—this is exactly what we love to hear!

And yes, we'd love to create a full-blown, action-packed standalone boxing game, but we don't quite have the player base yet to go all in.

That said, 5-star reviews like this help get us one step closer! Thanks so much for your support!

reviews.review_description: I have both their main fitness apps and love them both, heart rate up where it needs to be (if I put in the work...of course) I'm also going to get the ReCharge one soon as well. for some reason, I have faith that these devs have some more cool stuff coming...and I am SO on board!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review and 5 star review! And yes, more cool stuff is coming, we're doing our very best to make that happen!

reviews.review_description:
I never thought punching Broccoli would be so satisfying. I actually felt bad for the poor thing at times HAHAHA.
The Ball Smasher game is my favorite. I love a game that tricks me into working out. 
The app has gorgeous environments (plenty to unlock) and a nice soundtrack too.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! Yes, the poor Broccoli has been knocked out a lot of times but I luckily it's very strong. The gamification of exercise is exactly what we were going for and glad you are doing just that. We loved your video too

reviews.review_description:
Haven't worked out regularly in years, but this fitness app caught my eye. Tried Action Resort for the first time and it's really fun. 

Feels like playing games: boxing with your personal coach or dodging baseballs. 

Exercises sometimes get repetitive, workouts aren't super intense, but overall good for getting back to exercising.

developer_response.body: Exactly, we're trying to make fitness fun and accessible for everyone. Glad you gave it a try and enjoyed it! Thanks for the review.

reviews.review_description: This is basically the sassy cousin of your average workout routine. Looks fun, burns a lot of calories, and it leaves you feeling what so pumped (even if your virtual opponents are made of pixels)
Look, even a near-death VR experience deserves a decent view. Action Resort XR did deliver some stunning virtual landscapes. So there's that

reviews.review_title: Impressive but needs lower body training
reviews.review_description:
The graphics is impressive.
This game has found the key to fitness motivation - sexy trainers.
However, the boxing training doesn't meet my needs. I hope it can add dodging and footwork movement.
Also I find punching the trainer a lot more fun than punching food. I wish for a sparring with trainer mode.

reviews.review_title: Blending virtual fruits is so fun!
reviews.review_description: Who knew blending virtual fruits could be so fun? The smoothie bar is just a fantastic cool-down after a light boxing practice which is a great workout, by the way. It's weirdly satisfying to cut those fruits and reminds me slightly of Fruit Ninja. Anyway, it's a fun way to stay active and get your daily dose of vitamin C.

Gameplay Vide on my Youtube Channel

This is one of 3 Fitness games released by the same company at the same time. They all have the same look and trainers but work in different ways. you can setup the trainer how you want and unlock the more you play. Action Resort is a smaller game then fitness one but i enjoy it more.

Smoothie bar - is a great little touch where you have a little kitchen and make smoothies Food Fight - is just a punching bag basically Ball smasher - is a great mode wher eyou have 2 sticks to punch balls Boxing - is a great workout and with the trainer holding pads

This is a great app personally i would add this to the Fitness one to make one app as it would work alot better then

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the gameplay video, we found it very funny. Glad you enjoyed Action Resort too.

reviews.review_description: What a workout!! After only 20 minutes of the banana punching, mitt workout, and the ball game I burned 200 calories!! This is a great workout and fun at the same time. 10/10 would recommend

developer_response.body: Awesome KaleahVR, fantastic workout and we loved your YouTube video.

reviews.review_description: Skip the beach, forget the pool. Action Resort VR is your ultimate vacation. Battle robot pirates, dodge lasers on jet skis, and sword-fight a shark (safely!). It's a wild, hilarious VR adventure that'll get your heart pumping and leave you wanting more. Just don't blame me if you get a little motion sick. Joking joking :D It's a simle sparing and smothie simulator game

Yo, listen up! Forget the boring gym and grab your vr headset because this game is next-level. It's like stepping into a video game where you're the ultimate action hero. Punch robots or bananas :D, it's all there – and way more fun than your average workout. Oh and the smoothie bar! I tried some of those drinks my self, they are prity much acurate with ingridients, very cool

reviews.review_title: Boxing Practice is the Stress Reliever
reviews.review_description:
Boxing practice is the ultimate stress reliever! Punching virtual faces is way more fun than a gym session. The graphics are sick and the controls feel super realistic.

Only downside? The music isn't my style, but I just blast my own tunes while I'm playing it and the problem is solved.

reviews.review_title: It feels you're hitting those balls!
reviews.review_description: Ball smasher game mode is my favorite one. It helps to improve my reflexes. Tracking is on point and it actually feels like I'm really hitting those balls! ⚾️
Although the games has crazy fun game modes, Ballsmasher is by far my favorite one!
Beast mode activated! Interesting game, better then smelling sweat in gym

reviews.review_title: This app is on another level
reviews.review_description:
Forget boring treadmills, this app is all about boxing, blending smoothies & the CRAZIEST ball smasher mini-game EVER. Like, dodgeball meets Matrix & it's hilarious!

Seriously, so fun that my reflexes are on FIRE right now. Plus, there's more to explore – workouts, and stunning virtual environments.

reviews.review_title: Boxing practice wipes away the fatigue!
reviews.review_description:
I love surprisingly solid VR boxing experience! Training feels immersive, with great customization options for your virtual coach. Landing punches is satisfying, with good hit detection. It actually feels like I'm really hitting. It's a fantastic way to de-stress after a raid session in WoW,  and it wipes away the fatigue!

The only minor downside is UI. Sometimes it's unclear which boxing exercises I've completed and which are left on the circuit. A more clear progress indicator would be a nice improvement.

reviews.review_title: Drink a Smoothie and punch a Banana!
reviews.review_description: This is simply awesome! I could never imagine to create smoothies in VR and fight against a banana is so much fun! The Graphics are cool and the personal Trainer very motivating. I have all three games of the series (but i guess two parts would be enough) and i love it. Worth every Cent!
